text: Rule groups @ npsneamanritio (2) adriancanril . * Rule Groups contain rules * They don’t have default actions ... that's defined when groups or rules are added to WEBACLs * Mlanaged (AWS or Marketplace), Yours, Service Owned (i.e Shield & Firewall Manager) * Rule groups can be referenced by multiple WEBACL * Have a WCU capacity (defined upfront, max 1500%)
